note_roberta_rewritten: QuillBot-style T5_Paraphrase_Paws recall on full 500-sample adversarial set (all_results_with_hybrids.csv). The human study used QuillBot-style texts so this is the correct comparison. Earlier value of 0.066 came from results_adversarial.json which at the time held the early mislabelled T5-backup evaluation result — now corrected.
